# A Preliminary documents

• Preliminary documents are not 1 – Case summary.
evidence. They are summarised
documents that help the judge to 2 – Statement of issues.
understand what the case is
about quickly. 3 – Chronology
4 – Hearing timetable (if required)
• Authorities Decided court cases (case law),
